body.title: CC Nightly: palace node generation and updates
body.result: nightly palace writer: decision nodes + session brief, 18 tests green
body.description:
Generate decision nodes and session briefs from transcript analysis.

**Affected files:** lab/design_docs/D-*.md (generated), palace.decisions.*, palace.sessions.*
**Design rules:** palace-integration, idempotent-writes
**Scope boundary:**
  IN: Compile feedback + patterns + decisions into palace nodes, write decision records
  OUT: Palace query optimization, metrics
**Completion criteria:**
  1. For each decision made today, create palace node (spawned_tickets, decision narrative, hypothesis)
  2. For today's session, create palace.sessions.DATE.brief (what happened, next priorities, key insights)
  3. All writes are idempotent (same transcript → same nodes)
  4. Test: run nightly script, verify T-guru-loop-* decisions appear in palace
